title: GMS Week 41 - WHOANANZA
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 13/10/2025
Image reference: 2025-10-13_gms-week-41-whoananza_img1.jpg
In ship recycling, where even a day can make an incredible difference (the summer of circa 2006 when India lost about USD 100/Ton overnightdue to a collapse in steel prices, for example), a week can certainly make a dramatic difference especially given the turbulent nature of current times that global markets are enduring. Not only did the international markets ride through a rude awakening as a series of events and another proposed Peace Agreement in the Middle East between Hamas and Israel via the release of the all the hostages on the one hand, was met with the heads of states of Pakistan and the Taliban regime in Afghanistan pick up Russia's old bad habits in Ukraine as all nations reportedly engaged in aggressions pursuant to a collapse in prior peace talks. This will certainly affect the future of shipping / trade in the region and in turn, feed through to the global ship recycling markets via incoming tonnage, as change certainly seems as though it's in the air this week.
